headline: Uber Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 14, 2026--Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) will hold its quarterly conference call to discuss its first quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, May 6th at 5:00 a.m. Pacific Time (8:00 a.m. Eastern Time).

headline: 3 Reasons Lucid Stock Is Jumping Today
summary: Lucid stock was in the green early, up 5.2% in early trading at $9.72, while the  and  were up 0.4% and 0.2%, respectively.  The move came after Lucid announced entities connected with the Saudi Public Investment Fund were purchasing $550 million in preferred stock.  Uber  also plans to expand its partnership with Lucid for 35,000 robo-taxis, up from 20,000.

summary: Lucid Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: LCID), maker of the world's most advanced electric vehicles, today announced pricing of its underwritten public offering of its common stock for gross proceeds of $300 million. The underwritten offering is expected to close on or about April 15, 2026, subject to customary closing conditions.
